TextView.android:text: Start silently at app launch and device startup
Temporarily override the active preset with Battery Indicator while charging
Keep Aurora notification pinned while running
Match LED brightness to your screen brightness
Open Aurora on bottom screen by default
Capture bottom screen for LED sync
Use selected preset when no assigned app is foreground
Pulse the battery color while power is connected
Faster charging increases pulse speed when data is available
At full charge, use a cool blue-green with a gentle breathe
Long press any swatch to reset its default
Long press any swatch to reset its default
